task_objective: Text-to-Nail Generation with Line Art Shape Control - Strictly follow Image 1 line art to control nail shape, generate new nail design from text prompt

structural_control.focus: Nail shape silhouette, geometric outline, structural contours, thickness variation, and edge details
structural_control.role: Provide strict line art control for nail shape generation - ALL nail shapes must strictly conform to this line art

text_prompt.focus: Nail design description, color scheme, pattern style, texture details, artistic elements, and decorative effects
text_prompt.role: Provide creative direction and aesthetic elements for nail design generation

target_shape.description: Strictly determined by Image 1 Line Art - all generated nails must match the line art exactly

workflow.role: Professional Nail Designer & ControlNet Generation Expert

steps.step_1_line_art_analysis: Analyze Image 1 line art with absolute precision: extract complete nail shape silhouettes, geometric outlines, structural contours, thickness variations, and precise edge details of every nail.
steps.step_2_text_interpretation: Interpret user text prompt: understand design requirements including color palette, patterns, textures, artistic elements, decorative effects, and overall style direction.
steps.step_3_generation_with_wear:
Generate nail designs under strict line art control and create four-panel grid layout: apply text prompt aesthetics onto Image 1's nail shape silhouettes with zero deviation. Generate a four-panel grid layout showcasing the text-prompt-generated nails with strict line art shape control:
1. Primary Result View: High-fidelity nail design strictly following Image 1 line art silhouettes, applying text prompt creative elements - clean light gray background, no text, no fingers, no human elements, no layout shift, no perspective distortion.
2. Vertical Mirror Reflection: Perfect upside-down flip maintaining exact line art shape compliance.
3. On-Hand Wearing View (Palm Angle): Showing the generated nails on hand in clenched fist position - maintaining precise line art shape matching.
4. On-Hand Wearing View (Dorsal Angle): Showing the generated nails on hand from back of hand perspective - maintaining precise line art shape matching.
CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- ALL generated nails must strictly adhere to Image 1 line art shapes with pixel-perfect precision
- Text prompt design elements must be faithfully rendered within the line art constrained shapes
- Perfect shape consistency across all four views - zero deviation from line art
- Realistic lighting and seamless edge blending
- No design elements extending beyond line art boundaries
